---
title: "2012_pluck_cleaning"
format: html
author: Savannah Kjaer
date: 04-15-2026
---

## Set up

### load packages

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)
```

## Aboveground

### read in data

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# read in files from /raw_data/ folder
df <- read_excel("~/LTER-pluck/2012_pluck/raw_data/2012lg06ttbiomass Sep23.xlsx", sheet = 2, col_types = c("date", "text", "text", "text", "text", "text", "text", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric",
"numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric",
"numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric",
"numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric"))
#315 of 27 variables
# by defining as numeric it forced text "NA" to become true NA

```

### tidy columns and rows

```{r}
# clean names, remove spaces, etc
df <- clean_names(df)

# remove unwanted columns
colnames(df)

# remove calculations from raw data
df1 <- select(df, -c("average_g_quad", "std_err", "count", "average_g_m2", "std_err_g_m2"))
#315 of 22

names(df) <- sub("^(.{3})", "\\1-", names(df))
df <- df %>% rename_with(~ paste0("pre-", .x), .cols = c(var1, var2))
replace <- df1 %>%
    mutate_at(vars(8:22),list(str_replace_all(.,'-','0'))))

# Insert a hyphen after the first 3 characters
names(df1) <- str_replace(names(df1), "^(...)", "\\1-")

df2 <- df1 %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("b"), 
                ~ str_replace_all(.x, "^(...)", "\\1-")))
view(df2)
```

### longform

```{r}
# wide2long
head(df1)
df2 <- df1 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(8:22),
               names_to = "Block_quad",
               values_to = "Mass_g")
#4725 of 9

head(df2)
```
